ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent's purpose and capabilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Type of reinforcement learning algorithm used by the agent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment's characteristics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being trained */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the training takes place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session was last updated */,
  "total_rewards" REAL /* Total rewards received by the agent during the training session */,
  "average_rewards" REAL /* Average rewards received by the agent during the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the training session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "timestep_number" INTEGER /* Timestep number within the episode */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Rewards received at this timestep */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Observations at this timestep */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken at this timestep */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep was last updated */,
  "next_observation" TEXT /* Next observation in the episode */,
  "next_action" TEXT /* Next action taken by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestep when the reward was received */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was received */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
